extraction.one_line_summary: COQUARD Bryan won sprint stage after Quick-Step led into final corner but Vital Concept surged past in closing meters.
tactical_patterns: Quick-Step initiated leadout through final turn but failed to hold position, allowing Vital Concept to overhaul.
UAE and Sunweb sharing chase work suggests neither had primary sprinter invested in stage outcome.
Four-rider break maintained advantage until 10km mark despite warm conditions, indicating peloton controlled without stress.

rider_signals.COQUARD Bryan: positive: won despite Quick-Step controlling leadout through final corner, showing superior positioning or finishing speed
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: neutral: second at 4 seconds suggests competitive sprint but lacked final acceleration to counter Coquard's late surge
rider_signals.PÉRICHON Pierre-Luc: negative: dropped from early four-rider break before peloton chase intensified, indicating insufficient strength for long effort
